since_last: 64% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.11% · Gold -0.92% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 64% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.99%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +4.68%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.68%, ARM +3.97%, QCOM +3.12%, LSCC +3.04%, EQIX +2.82%. Laggards: MDB -2.07%, SAP -1.45%, NOW -1.37%, BABA -0.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.14% at $157.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
